entities.name: CROP MONITORING
entities.description: The process of observing and assessing crop growth and health over time to ensure food security.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL SERVING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs designed to provide services and support to the agricultural sector.

entities.name: GOOGLE EARTH ENGINE (GEE)
entities.description: A cloud-based platform for geospatial analysis and processing of time series satellite data.

entities.name: NORMALIZED DIFFERENCE VEGETATION INDEX (NDVI)
entities.description: A numerical indicator used to assess live green vegetation, derived from satellite imagery.

entities.name: SUPERVISED CLASSIFICATION
entities.description: A machine learning task of classifying data into predefined categories based on labeled training data.

entities.name: MACHINE LEARNING CLASSIFIERS
entities.description: Algorithms that learn to categorize data based on patterns in training sets, evaluated in the GEE platform.

entities.name: SPECTRAL MATCHING TECHNIQUE (SMT)
entities.description: A technique used for crop classification by matching spectral signatures with ground data.

entities.name: SENTINEL-2
entities.description: A satellite mission providing 10 m multi-spectral imagery used for crop type classification.

entities.name: JHANSI DISTRICT
entities.description: The specific geographical area where the crop classification study was conducted for the 2018-19 rabi season.

entities.name: RANDOM FOREST (RF)
entities.description: An ensemble learning classifier that produced 81.8% accuracy and outperformed other ML classifiers.

entities.name: SUPPORT VECTOR MACHINE (SVM)
entities.description: A supervised learning classifier that produced 68.8% accuracy in the study.

entities.name: CLASSIFICATION AND REGRESSION TREES (CART)
entities.description: A decision tree classifier that produced 64.9% accuracy in the study.

entities.name: GROUND DATA
entities.description: Actual field observations used to train classifiers and validate classification maps.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL STATISTICS
entities.description: Quantitative data used to compare and validate the results obtained from classifiers.
